The '''Duinuogwuin Contention''' took place in [[15,500 BBY]] and was a major conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] people. [[Scout/Legends|Exploration scouts]] from the Republic made [[First contact with Duinuogwuin|first contact]] with the Duinuogwuin, or "Star Dragons" as they were known. Having been frightened by their appearance, the scouts beat a hasty retreat to the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Hundreds of Duinuogwuin followed through [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and [[Attack on Coruscant|attacked the capital]], until peace was brokered by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Fillorean]].

==History==
During the [[Indecta Era]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] sought to explore [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and seek out new [[Species/Legends|lifeforms]].<ref name="tea" /> In [[15,500 BBY]], [[Scout/Legends|Republic scouts]] exploring the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] made [[First contact with Duinuogwuin|first contact]] with the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]], or "Star Dragons," as they were commonly known,<ref name="nec" /> near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]].<ref name="tea" /> The Duinuogwuin were fifty-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] long [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] that could fly through [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and breathe atomic fire—the scouts responded with fear. The first meeting between the two parties was a disaster, and gave rise to conflict between the entire Duinuogwuin species and the Galactic Republic.<ref name="nec" />

[[File:Stardragongg4.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A Duinuogwuin, or "Star Dragon." The appearance of the gigantic beings proved fearsome to the Republic scouts.]]
The scouts beat a hasty retreat back to the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Hundreds of Duinuogwuin, responding to the first contact, followed the scout [[Starship/Legends|ships]] through space, and upon reaching the capital, [[Attack on Coruscant|attacked it]].<ref name="nec" /> The Duinuogwuin laid waste to [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]], breathing their atomic fire and bringing devastation, causing concern among the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] as a result.<ref name="tea" /> [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Fillorean]] was able to broker peace, and bring an end to the Duinuogwuin Contention by negotiating with the Duinuogwuin philosopher [[Borz'Mat'oh]].<ref name="nec" />

In the wake of the mutual peace, Fillorean and Borz'Mat'oh founded the [[University of Coruscant/Legends|University of Coruscant]], an academic institution which endured for thousands upon thousands of years. Within the main campus, statues of both Fillorean and Borz'Mat'oh were erected.<ref name="ctcw" /> Coruscant itself later came to be seen as the focal point for the Duinuogwuin Contention.<ref name="tea" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Duinuogwuin Contention was first mentioned in the sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', published in [[2003]].<ref name="ctcw" />
